caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.caption: An octopus has three hearts
shots.visual: beautiful real octopus, calm full-body read

shots.voiceover: Two hearts push blood through the gills.
shots.caption: two hearts / push through the gills
shots.visual: two subtle pulse points near gill area, no labels

shots.voiceover: The third sends blood to the rest of the body.
shots.caption: the third / powers the body
shots.visual: single subtle body pulse, no diagram text

shots.voiceover: And when it swims, that body heart can slow down.
shots.caption: when it swims / one heart slows
shots.visual: octopus swimming motion, avoid detached tentacles

shots.voiceover: That is why crawling can be easier than swimming.
shots.caption: crawling can be easier
